_metadata.source: U.S. Department of Education - College Scorecard API
_metadata.description: Verified IPEDS data reported by institutions to the federal government
_metadata.disclaimer: Cost data is from the most recent IPEDS reporting year. Net prices are verified federal averages.

stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant for eligible low-income and middle-income Ohio residents attending approved private colleges.

stateGrants.name: Georgia HOPE Grant (Technical Colleges)
stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant for Georgia residents attending state technical colleges with demonstrated financial need.

stateGrants.name: Georgia Grant for Students with Unmet Need
stateGrants.keyDetail: Additional need-based grant for Georgia students demonstrating significant unmet financial need.

stateGrants.name: North Carolina Need-Based Scholarship
stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant for North Carolina residents with demonstrated financial need attending eligible institutions.

stateGrants.name: Education Lottery Scholarship - Grant Component
stateGrants.keyDetail: Grant funded by lottery proceeds for North Carolina students with financial need at UNC system schools.

stateGrants.name: Michigan Competitive Scholarship
stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant for Michigan residents with demonstrated financial need at approved Michigan institutions.

stateGrants.name: Michigan Tuition Grant
stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant for Michigan residents attending eligible independent and nonprofit institutions.

stateGrants.name: New Jersey Tuition Aid Grant (TAG)
stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant for New Jersey residents with demonstrated financial need attending approved New Jersey institutions.

stateGrants.name: Educational Opportunity Fund (EOF) Grant
stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant program for educationally and economically disadvantaged students at New Jersey public colleges.

stateGrants.name: Virginia Guaranteed Assistance Program (VGAP)
stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant for Virginia residents with demonstrated financial need attending Virginia higher education institutions.

stateGrants.name: Virginia Student Grant (VSG)
stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant program for Virginia residents at approved private nonprofit colleges and universities in Virginia.

stateGrants.name: Arizona Leveraging Educational Assistance Partnership (AZLEAP)
stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant for Arizona residents demonstrating significant financial need at approved institutions.

stateGrants.name: Massachusetts Grant (MASSGrant)
stateGrants.keyDetail: Need-based grant program for Massachusetts residents with demonstrated financial need attending eligible institutions.

stateGrants.name: Gilbert Grant
stateGrants.keyDetail: Supplemental need-based grant for Massachusetts residents at public higher education institutions in the state.

federalPrograms.name: Federal Pell Grant
federalPrograms.description: Need-based grant for undergraduates with exceptional financial need. Does not need to be repaid.
federalPrograms.eligibility: Determined by FAFSA; based on Expected Family Contribution (now Student Aid Index). Generally for families earning under ~$60,000.
federalPrograms.deadline: FAFSA opens October 1 annually; federal deadline June 30

federalPrograms.name: Federal Supplemental Educational Opportunity Grant (FSEOG)
federalPrograms.description: Need-based grant for undergraduates with exceptional financial need, prioritizing students with lowest Expected Family Contribution.
federalPrograms.eligibility: Must also qualify for Pell Grant. Administered by participating institutions.
federalPrograms.deadline: FAFSA submission required; institutional deadlines vary

federalPrograms.name: Federal Work-Study (FWS)
federalPrograms.description: Part-time employment opportunity for undergraduate and graduate students with financial need. Provides practical work experience while helping pay education costs.
federalPrograms.eligibility: Must demonstrate financial need via FAFSA. Must be enrolled at least half-time.
federalPrograms.deadline: FAFSA submission required; institutional deadlines vary

federalPrograms.name: Teacher Education Assistance for College and Higher Education (TEACH) Grant
federalPrograms.description: Provides grants to students who are enrolled in teacher preparation programs and willing to serve as full-time teachers in high-need schools.
federalPrograms.eligibility: Must be enrolled in an eligible teacher preparation program. Must teach full-time in a high-need school for 4 years or repay grant as loan with interest.

federalPrograms.name: Iraq and Afghanistan Service Grant
federalPrograms.description: Grant for students whose parent or guardian died as a result of military service in Iraq or Afghanistan after 9/11.
federalPrograms.eligibility: Parent/guardian must have died in Iraq or Afghanistan on active duty after September 10, 2001. Student must have been under 24 at time of parent's death and enrolled full-time.
federalPrograms.deadline: Submit documentation to institution; deadline varies

federalPrograms.name: Federal Direct Subsidized Loan
federalPrograms.description: Need-based loan where the federal government pays interest while you're in school at least half-time. No interest accrues while enrolled.
federalPrograms.eligibility: Must demonstrate financial need via FAFSA. Annual limits vary by year in school.
federalPrograms.deadline: FAFSA submission required; institutional deadlines vary

federalPrograms.name: Federal Direct Unsubsidized Loan
federalPrograms.description: Non-need-based loan available to undergraduate and graduate students. Interest accrues immediately and throughout enrollment.
federalPrograms.eligibility: No demonstrated financial need required. Annual and aggregate limits vary by dependent/independent and program status.
federalPrograms.deadline: FAFSA submission required; institutional deadlines vary

federalPrograms.name: Federal Direct PLUS Loan (Parent)
federalPrograms.description: Federal loan available to parents of dependent undergraduate students. Parents can borrow up to the full cost of attendance minus other aid.
federalPrograms.eligibility: Parents of dependent undergraduate students. Credit check required; debt-to-income limits apply.
federalPrograms.deadline: FAFSA submission required; institutional deadlines vary
federalPrograms.borrowingLimit: Full cost of attendance minus other aid

federalPrograms.name: Federal Perkins Loan
federalPrograms.description: Note: No longer available for new borrowers as of 2018, but still active for existing borrowers. Was a low-interest need-based loan for students with exceptional financial need.
federalPrograms.eligibility: Not available for new borrowers. Existing borrowers may continue.
